trans-unit.source: {0} depends on {1}, it will be added automatically.
trans-unit.target: {0} depende de {1}, se añadirá automáticamente.

trans-unit.source: {0} requires {1}, you should add it manually.
trans-unit.target: {0} requiere {1}, debe añadirlo manualmente.

trans-unit.source: {0} suggests adding {1}.
trans-unit.target: {0} sugiere añadir {1}.

trans-unit.source: The request contains an invalid argument.
trans-unit.target: La solicitud contiene un argumento no válido.

trans-unit.source: Unable to resolve tenant for the current request.
trans-unit.target: No se puede resolver el inquilino para la solicitud actual.

trans-unit.source: The request cannot be executed in the current system state.
trans-unit.target: La solicitud no puede ejecutarse en el estado actual del sistema.

trans-unit.source: The request does not have valid authentication credentials.
trans-unit.target: La solicitud no tiene credenciales de autenticación válidas.

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to perform this action.
trans-unit.target: No tiene permiso para realizar esta acción.

trans-unit.source: The requested resource was not found.
trans-unit.target: No se encontró el recurso solicitado.

trans-unit.source: The resource already exists.
trans-unit.target: El recurso ya existe.

trans-unit.source: A concurrency conflict occurred while saving to the database.
trans-unit.target: Se produjo un conflicto de concurrencia al guardar en la base de datos.

trans-unit.source: One or more validation errors occurred.
trans-unit.target: Se produjeron uno o más errores de validación.

trans-unit.source: Rate limit exceeded.
trans-unit.target: Límite de velocidad excedido.

trans-unit.source: {0} '{1}' not found.
trans-unit.target: {0} '{1}' no encontrado.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred.
trans-unit.target: Se produjo un error.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' must not be empty.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' no debe estar vacío.

trans-unit.source: Unsupported algorithm: {0}.
trans-unit.target: Algoritmo no compatible: {0}.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not supported.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' no es compatible.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not configured.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' no está configurado.

trans-unit.source: Application has no sector identifier URI and no redirect URIs.
trans-unit.target: La aplicación no tiene URI de identificador de sector ni URIs de redirección.

trans-unit.source: Cannot resolve a resource name without a pattern.
trans-unit.target: No se puede resolver un nombre de recurso sin un patrón.

trans-unit.source: Invalid table name '{0}' of type '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Nombre de tabla no válido '{0}' del tipo '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Entity must have at least one [Key].
trans-unit.target: La entidad debe tener al menos un [Key].

trans-unit.source: Entity key cannot be null.
trans-unit.target: La clave de entidad no puede ser null.

trans-unit.source: Entity key count mismatch.
trans-unit.target: La cantidad de claves de entidad no coincide.

trans-unit.source: Cannot resolve parameter '{0}' of type '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: No se puede resolver el parámetro '{0}' del tipo '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Cannot resolve parameter '{0}' of method '{1}' on type '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: No se puede resolver el parámetro '{0}' del método '{1}' en el tipo '{2}'.

trans-unit.source: Unable to convert '{0}' to {1}.
trans-unit.target: No se puede convertir '{0}' a {1}.

trans-unit.source: Mapping for field {0} is missing a source field.
trans-unit.target: Falta un campo de origen en la asignación para el campo {0}.

trans-unit.source: Tenant is not initialized successfully.
trans-unit.target: El inquilino no se inicializó correctamente.

trans-unit.source: Entry assembly is null.
trans-unit.target: El ensamblado de entrada es null.

trans-unit.source: The type {0} does not implement {1}.
trans-unit.target: El tipo {0} no implementa {1}.

trans-unit.source: Invalid request payload.
trans-unit.target: Carga de solicitud no válida.

trans-unit.source: Cross-parent reading is not supported for this resource.
trans-unit.target: La lectura entre padres no es compatible con este recurso.

trans-unit.source: The page token is invalid or has expired.
trans-unit.target: El token de página no es válido o ha expirado.

trans-unit.source: The {0} expression is malformed.
trans-unit.target: La expresión {0} tiene un formato incorrecto.

trans-unit.source: Invalid field.
trans-unit.target: Campo no válido.

trans-unit.source: Invalid field name '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Nombre de campo no válido '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Function '{0}' not registered.
trans-unit.target: La función '{0}' no está registrada.

trans-unit.source: The user manager must produce an authenticator key after reset.
trans-unit.target: El administrador de usuarios debe producir una clave de autenticador después del restablecimiento.

trans-unit.source: The client credentials are missing or invalid.
trans-unit.target: The client credentials are missing or invalid.

trans-unit.source: Client secret is required for confidential clients.
trans-unit.target: Client secret is required for confidential clients.

trans-unit.source: The request uses more than one client authentication method.
trans-unit.target: The request uses more than one client authentication method.

trans-unit.source: The provided grant is invalid, expired, or revoked.
trans-unit.target: The provided grant is invalid, expired, or revoked.

trans-unit.source: The code_verifier does not match the code_challenge.
trans-unit.target: The code_verifier does not match the code_challenge.

trans-unit.source: The requested scope is not allowed for this client.
trans-unit.target: The requested scope is not allowed for this client.

trans-unit.source: The client is not authorized to use this grant type.
trans-unit.target: The client is not authorized to use this grant type.

trans-unit.source: The resource owner or authorization server denied the request.
trans-unit.target: The resource owner or authorization server denied the request.

trans-unit.source: The redirect_uri does not match any registered URI.
trans-unit.target: The redirect_uri does not match any registered URI.

trans-unit.source: User consent is required.
trans-unit.target: User consent is required.

trans-unit.source: User authentication is required.
trans-unit.target: User authentication is required.

trans-unit.source: The authorization request is still pending.
trans-unit.target: The authorization request is still pending.

trans-unit.source: The polling interval is too short. Increase the interval and retry.
trans-unit.target: The polling interval is too short. Increase the interval and retry.

trans-unit.source: An internal server error occurred.
trans-unit.target: An internal server error occurred.

trans-unit.source: The '{0}' prompt value cannot be combined with other values.
trans-unit.target: The '{0}' prompt value cannot be combined with other values.

trans-unit.source: The '{0}' prompt value is not supported for this client.
trans-unit.target: The '{0}' prompt value is not supported for this client.

trans-unit.source: A valid user identity is required for this request.
trans-unit.target: A valid user identity is required for this request.

trans-unit.source: Unable to resolve {0}.
trans-unit.target: No se puede resolver {0}.
